Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Otoku]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 5''' — Otoku is a doll of a little girl with long black hair and a red flower patterned dress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Otoku is the name of one of the dolls Kai addresses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 11''' — Otoku is someone Kai cradles who can communicate with a hazy mental voice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — Otoku is a talking doll that Simon carries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — Otoku is tied to Simon's belt and communicates with him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — Otoku claims the Nye never leave their home.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 19''' — Otoku provides combat instructions to Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 19''' — Otoku provided a warning to Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 21''' — Otoku commented on victory and defeat.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — Otoku is someone who would mock Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Otoku is a doll that could warn Kai of Valin's strikes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Otoku communicates with Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Otoku is someone who would respond to Simon with a joke or sarcasm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Otoku is a doll with long, dark hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Otoku is a doll that can move and speak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Otoku is in Simon's head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 18''' — Otoku can communicate with Simon via thought.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Otoku's voice can be heard in Simon's mind.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — Otoku is a character who lies in Kai's lap.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — Otoku has long, black hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — Otoku is a character who speaks with tones of self-satisfaction.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 8''' — Otoku is a character Simon considered asking.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Otoku is a being that responds to Kai's voice with a windy sigh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Otoku is a character who comments on Simon's learning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Otoku's face was crushed and torn away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Kai wanted to protect Otoku.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Kai seeks to avenge Otoku.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Azura senses an image of Otoku with half her face torn away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Otoku had long, black hair and half of her face was shattered.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Otoku's name is on the same headstone as Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Otoku is deceased.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
